subcodes.first_line: The One concerning Whom the tongue of grandeur and might hath spoken, were He to know that a single one among the Christians would believe [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الذی فی شانه تکلمت لسان العظمه و الاقتدار لو علمت ان احدا من النصاری یومن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan
